home.title: Smart CRM for freelancers, SMBs, and enterprises
home.description: Manage your contacts, deals, tasks, and communications with an AI-powered smart CRM. Free trial available.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Explore our Solo, Pro, and Team plans. Free CRM for freelancers, advanced plans for growing businesses.

features.title: Features
features.description: Discover all Qeylo CRM features: contact management, sales pipeline, AI, productivity tools, and more.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
ai.description: A built-in AI assistant that analyzes your data, suggests actions, and automates your sales tasks.

sales.title: Sales Management
sales.description: Visual pipeline, deal tracking, revenue forecasts, and conversion tools to boost your sales.

contacts.title: Contact Management
contacts.description: Centralize and enrich your contacts, segment audiences, and track every interaction.

communication.title: Communication
communication.description: Integrated email, customizable templates, and automated sequences for effective communication.

productivity.title: Productivity
productivity.description: Tasks, calendar, automated workflows, and collaboration tools to boost efficiency.
